criteria.name: Pipeline completes exit code 0
criteria.evidence: Phase 7 exit gate passed in previous review. cleaning.py runs successfully.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have hourly + daily CSVs
criteria.evidence: Manifest lists all 6 stations with artifacts.

criteria.evidence: Previously verified. FWI calculation correct where RH data exists.

criteria.name: All 4 report artifacts exist
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json, imputation_report.csv, qa_qc_report.csv, stanhope_validation.csv all present.

criteria.name: No gaps > 7 days in hourly data
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests.

criteria.name: Continuous coverage from earliest PEINP to latest Licor
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests.

criteria.name: Manifest reports 0 unprocessed files
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json shows unprocessed_count=0. Pseudo-station keys starting with '_' correctly excluded.

criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: 11 test failures across 3 files: (1) tests/test_validation.py — 7 failures in TestCompareStationData due to compare_station_data() receiving a string instead of DataFrame at validation.py line 89, (2) tests/test_repo_shape.py — 1 failure: requirements.lock not in ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES whitelist at line 48, (3) tests/test_pipeline_execution.py — 3 failures: daily CSV artifacts missing 'rows' field, imputation_report not tracked as typed artifact in manifest.

failing_nodes.message: validate_against_reference() calls compare_station_data() with a string instead of DataFrame — causes 7 test failures in TestCompareStationData
ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES set does not include 'requirements.lock', but requirements.lock exists in repo root
Manifest artifacts for daily CSVs missing 'rows' field; imputation_report not tracked as a typed artifact in manifest

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: 7 of 8 acceptance criteria pass. REJECT due to AC-E2E-8 (full test suite fails). Ralph's fix commit (9251ada) addressed AC-E2E-7 (unprocessed_count pseudo-station exclusion) and fixed import paths in test_data_refresh.py, but did NOT address the 3 previously identified failing nodes: (1) validation.py compare_station_data() string-vs-DataFrame bug, (2) requirements.lock missing from repo shape whitelist, (3) manifest daily artifacts missing 'rows' field and imputation_report type. These same 3 issues persist unchanged.
